'''Gravitech''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technology corporation. They manufactured the [[M—Well Nav Detector]], an example of which was installed aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].<ref name="Riders" />

{{Company-stub}}
